      • sendText(ws: WsConnection; s: string)

      • websocketUpgrade(req: ptr evhttp_request; onOpen: WsOpenCb = nil; onMessage: WsMessageCb = nil; onClose: WsCloseCb = nil; onError: WsErrorCb = nil): WsConnection

Types

CloseCb = WsCloseCb
ErrorCb = WsErrorCb
MessageCb = WsMessageCb
OpenCb = WsOpenCb
WebSocketConnection = WsConnection
WebSocketFrameKind = WsFrameKind
WsCloseCb = proc (ws: WsConnection; code: int; reason: string) {....gcsafe.}
WsConnection = ref WebSocketConnectionImpl
WsErrorCb = proc (ws: WsConnection; err: string) {....gcsafe.}
WsFrameKind = enum
  wsContinuation = 0, wsText = 1, wsBinary = 2, wsClose = 8, wsPing = 9,
  wsPong = 10
WsMessageCb = proc (ws: WsConnection; kind: WsFrameKind; data: openArray[byte]) {.
    ...gcsafe.}
WsOpenCb = proc (ws: WsConnection) {....gcsafe.}

Procs

proc closeWs(ws: WsConnection; code: int = 1000; reason = "") {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc sendBinary(ws: WsConnection; data: openArray[byte]) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc sendPing(ws: WsConnection; data: openArray[byte] = []) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc sendPong(ws: WsConnection; data: openArray[byte] = []) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc sendText(ws: WsConnection; s: string) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc websocketUpgrade(req: ptr evhttp_request; onOpen: WsOpenCb = nil;
                      onMessage: WsMessageCb = nil; onClose: WsCloseCb = nil;
                      onError: WsErrorCb = nil): WsConnection {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
